title: magnolia liliifera var. angatensis
intro: Magnolia liliifera var. angatensis is a variety of tree native to the Philippines, belonging to the Magnoliaceae family, known for its unique flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Magnolia liliifera var. angatensis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to alleviate various health conditions.
